title: Mansize Facial Tissue Box Multipack, 24 Tissue Boxes x 75 Sheets, 2-Ply White Tissues, Absorbent, Soft and Hygienic for Daily Use - Home & Office Use
features: High Absorbency: Softesse 2-ply tissues are highly absorbent, perfect for managing runny noses, coughs, and sneezes. They quickly capture and hold moisture without falling apart or leaving residue behind.

Premium Softness: Made with premium-quality materials, Softesse facial tissues provide a luxurious, soft feel. Their gentle texture is ideal for sensitive skin, helping to prevent irritation and redness while offering a soothing experience.

Strength and Durability: Designed for everyday use, Softesse tissues offer excellent strength while maintaining their softness. The 2-ply construction ensures the tissues won’t tear easily, even when wet, making them durable and reliable.

Hygienic Protection: Softesse tissues prioritize hygiene with materials that protect against germs and bacteria. Safe for use on sensitive areas like the face and nose, they provide a clean, hygienic experience every time.

Eco-Friendly Choice: Softesse facial tissues are made with eco-conscious materials, offering an environmentally friendly option for customers who care about sustainability. Enjoy high-quality tissues while reducing your environmental impact.
description: Softesse Mansize Facial Tissues Box Multipack is a premium product designed for everyday comfort and exceptional performance. Each multipack contains 24 boxes of facial tissues, with 75 sheets per box, totaling 1,800 sheets. These tissues are perfect for anyone seeking softness, strength, and high absorbency in a facial tissue. Softness and Comfort: Softesse tissues are crafted with sensitive skin in mind. Their 2-ply construction ensures a delicate touch that won’t irritate your skin, providing the ideal level of comfort for your face. Whether you're wiping away tears or simply refreshing your face, you can trust these tissues to feel soft and gentle. Strength and Durability: Despite their softness, Softesse tissues are incredibly durable. The 2-ply layers offer strength that prevents tearing, even when they’re wet. They can handle a runny nose, sneezing, or any task without breaking apart, making them reliable for everyday use. High Absorbency: Softesse tissues are designed for maximum absorbency. Whether dealing with a cold or simply freshening up, these tissues efficiently absorb moisture and remain intact without leaving any residue behind. They offer the absorbency you need without compromising strength or comfort. Hygienic and Safe: Softesse prioritizes hygiene with every tissue. They are made from materials that are safe for sensitive areas, like your face and nose, offering a clean and hygienic experience. With Softesse, you get peace of mind knowing your tissues are crafted for both performance and protection. Eco-Friendly Choice: For those who care about sustainability, Softesse facial tissues are made from recyclable, eco-friendly materials. This makes them an excellent choice for consumers looking to reduce their environmental impact without compromising on quality. Convenient and Practical: The tissues come in sleek, easy-to-store packaging, perfect for use at home, in the office, or on-the-go. The boxes are compact and stackable, ensuring that they take up minimal space while still providing a large supply of tissues when you need them most. Multi-Purpose Use: These tissues are versatile and ideal for a range of uses. Whether you're blowing your nose, wiping away makeup, cleaning up spills, or just needing a gentle tissue for general cleaning tasks, Softesse tissues are up to the job. They provide the perfect balance of softness, strength, and absorbency for any task.
